purpose: Repository-level license early-priority filter. Deduplicated by repository so no repository was requested twice.
terminal_status_note: Every signal here is observed on the repository default branch (HEAD), not on a candidate's pinned base revision. Under the recorded license status model this is classifier-none-uninspected-tree or an equivalent uninspected state. It orders work; it never makes license-or-use-basis pass, and it is not an exclusion basis. A row may only reach exact-revision-license-confirmed or exact-revision-no-license-basis after LICENSE, COPYING, NOTICE, manifest, and README are inspected at its own pinned revision.

probe_methods.core-api-repository-metadata-classifier: GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}; reads GitHub's license classifier. Core rate-limit bucket.
probe_methods.raw-head-default-branch-file-presence: HEAD request to raw.githubusercontent.com/{repo}/HEAD/{name} for LICENSE, LICENSE.md, LICENSE.txt, LICENCE, LICENCE.md, COPYING, COPYING.md, UNLICENSE, NOTICE.

method_agreement_check.disagreement_note: FRONTENDBOOTCAMP-17th/Cookeat exposes LICENSE.md while the classifier reports NOASSERTION, i.e. a license file exists that GitHub could not identify. The two signals answer different questions and are reported separately rather than merged.

known_limitations: HEAD is not a pinned revision; a license present today may be absent at a candidate's base revision, and the reverse is also possible.
The two probe methods are not equivalent: one reports an identified SPDX license, the other only that a license-named file exists.
File-presence probing checks a fixed filename list at the repository root and would miss a license declared only elsewhere.
No candidate row's decision or screening value was changed by this artifact.
summary_attribution_note: The per-entry source_pool_id records which probe run first reached that repository, and repositories are deduplicated globally, so a repository holding rows in both pools is attributed to one run only. Use pool_coverage_from_ledger for per-pool figures; it is recomputed from the ledger rows rather than from probe attribution.
